name: GOLF SIMULATOR RENTALS - ParTee Golf Rentals
about: ParTee Golf Simulator Rentals is a mobile golf simulator rental service specializing in high-tech, portable setups for events and special occasions. They provide state-of-the-art golf simulators that can be brought directly to any venue, offering a premium golfing experience without requiring a dedicated facility. The company is best known for its unique outdoor daytime simulator that is functional in direct sunlight, a feature not commonly found. With multiple simulator packages available to suit different event sizes, budgets, and locations, they offer customizable solutions for corporate events, parties, and fundraisers, handling all setup, equipment, and on-staff needs.
why_golfers_like_it: Exclusive daytime outdoor simulators that perform in direct sunlight
Turnkey event service with professional staff handling all setup and equipment
High-quality, portable setups offering a premium experience at any venue

food_and_drink.notes: BYOK (Bring Your Own Food) is implied by the mobile, event-based model.
BYOB (Bring Your Own Beverage) is implied by the mobile, event-based model.

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own golf clubs?
faq.answer: No, we provide clubs, balls, and all other necessary golf equipment when you book an event through our team.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: Yes, as a mobile rental service for events, you are welcome to bring your own food and beverages to your event.

faq.question: How long does an 18-hole round take?
faq.answer: The duration of an 18-hole round is not specified, but the event length is customizable to fit your schedule.

faq.question: Is this a kid-friendly activity?
faq.answer: Yes, our golf simulators are suitable for all ages and are great for family-friendly events like birthday parties.
